prompt: Perform a complete CRUD cycle on a knowledge graph: 1) Create entities: ProjectAlpha (type: project, observations: ['started in 2024', 'React-based']), ReactLib (type: library, observations: ['UI framework', 'version 18']). 2) Create relation: ProjectAlpha uses ReactLib. 3) Add observation 'has 3 team members' to ProjectAlpha. 4) Delete the observation 'started in 2024' from ProjectAlpha. 5) Delete the relation between ProjectAlpha and ReactLib. 6) Read the entire graph and report the final state, confirming the deletions took effect correctly.
